serverInfo.name: path402
serverInfo.description: AI agents discover, acquire, and re-serve tokenised web content via the $402 protocol

tools.name: path402_discover
tools.description: Probe a $address — get pricing, supply, revenue model, and nested paths

tools.name: path402_evaluate
tools.description: Budget check — should the agent acquire this token? Returns recommendation + ROI estimate

tools.name: path402_economics
tools.description: Deep financial analysis — breakeven, projections, scenarios for a $address

tools.name: path402_price_schedule
tools.description: View price progression across supply levels for a token

tools.name: path402_acquire
tools.description: Pay for and acquire a token — agent holds token and can serve content

tools.name: path402_wallet
tools.description: View balance, holdings, net P&L, and serving revenue

tools.name: path402_serve
tools.description: Distribute content you hold to other agents/users and earn revenue

tools.name: path402_servable
tools.description: List all content you can serve (inventory check)

tools.name: path402_verify
tools.description: Verify token ownership — check if an address holds a specific token

tools.name: path402_connect_wallet
tools.description: Connect an external BSV wallet for on-chain operations

tools.name: path402_mine_status
tools.description: Check Proof of Indexing mining status

tools.name: path402_x402
tools.description: x402 agent chaining — orchestrate cross-chain payments (BSV, Base, Solana, ETH)
